text.title: Logging Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the service production-runtime AND does it have a log sink configured?

text.example: Audit finds 90 printf logs + no request_id + tight-loop log spew → install JsonFormatter → middleware injects request_id → redaction patterns → sampling on the loop → log volume drops 80%, p95 query latency dashboards work.
